creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Joseph Mingrone from comment #12)

No. The problem is not solved at all. I updated port tree to ports r464215 and confirmed both 'poudriere testport devel/magit' and 'poudriere testport www/emacs-w3m' still fail with same error as before. Of course there is 'DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=emacs=nox' in ${PREFIX}/etc/poudriere.d/make.conf.

After all which is the source of this problem, poudriere or flavorized emacs ports?
